description_long: This coupe car features a striking blue body with contrasting gray lower panels and a prominent black rear spoiler, giving it a sporty and aggressive appearance. The front end is equipped with a low, aerodynamic bumper, dual headlights, and a subtle grille, while the rear showcases rectangular taillights and a clean, streamlined trunk. The side profile reveals two doors, flared wheel arches, and racing-style wheels with visible red brake calipers, as well as a roll cage visible through the windows, suggesting a performance-oriented build. The windows are tinted, and the interior appears to have bucket seats and a minimalist dashboard, emphasizing function over luxury. The car sits low to the ground, enhancing its racing stance, and features side exhaust pipes for added performance flair. Overall, the design is reminiscent of classic European racing coupes, blending vintage lines with modern racing elements.
description: A blue and gray two-door coupe car with a black rear spoiler, racing wheels, and a visible roll cage, exuding a sporty, performance-focused style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue hood, dual headlights, low bumper, and a glimpse of the roll cage through the windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe profile, flared arches, racing wheels, side exhaust, and red roll cage inside.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black spoiler, rectangular taillights, and the clean trunk design with rear window details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coupe silhouette, racing wheels, and side exhaust, with interior roll cage visible.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
